items.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
items.summary: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
